judge.reason: The primary purpose of arp_create is to allocate and fill an ARP sk_buff (packet construction), not to manage reference counts. The only refcount-related call is alloc_skb which initializes a new skb's refcount to 1, and kfree_skb on error which releases it. These are incidental allocation/cleanup steps, not the focus of the function.
